title: Quiz
dek: In 1978, four men, two of them twin brothers, set up shop in the basement beneath a dentist’s office; one of them later recalled getting used to the smell of the “happy gas” drifting down from the chairs above.

title: TIL: Qualcomm Bet the Company on Trucks Before It Bet on Your Phone
dek: How a satellite tracker for eighteen-wheelers funded a wireless idea everyone else called impossible, and why the company may be running the same play again.
